summary: Created 5 files for browser Python and Java ports. web_main.py: async pygbag adaptation with asyncio.sleep(0) in game loop. pygbag.toml: build config 610x700. build-python-wasm.sh: copies python files, replaces main.py, runs pygbag --build. cheerpj-loader.html: dark themed HTML loading CheerpJ 3 from CDN, cheerpjInit()+cheerpjRunJar(), spinner/progress, keyboard controls. build-java-jar.sh: runs mvn clean package, copies JAR and loader to frontend/public/game/java/.
